name: Booking Holdings
analysis: BKNG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $178.9450, stop $156.5388, target $207.4982 (1.27:1) — then trail it.
